summary: All tests PASSED for AI-Powered Insights and Tenant Rent Payment features. Backend API tests all passed (8/8). Frontend UI tests all passed - AI Insights page loads correctly with 'Powered by GPT-4' badge, upgrade notice for non-Pro users, 4 quick stats cards, 5 category buttons, and 'Ask AI Anything' input field. Tenant Portal 'Pay Rent' tab is visible and functional with Stripe integration messaging.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ai/quick-stats returns 200 with correct structure (properties, occupancy_rate, monthly_revenue, open_maintenance)
Backend: POST /api/ai/insights returns 403 for non-Pro users with 'AI insights require Pro plan' message
Backend: AI endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/rent-payments returns 200 with payments list
Backend: GET /api/rent-payments/summary returns 200 with summary stats (total_expected, total_collected, outstanding, collection_rate, total_payments)
Backend: GET /api/tenant-portal/rent-payments requires tenant authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: GET /api/tenant-portal/rent-payments returns array when authenticated as tenant
Frontend: AI Insights page loads at /ai-insights with data-testid='ai-insights-page'
Frontend: 'Powered by GPT-4' badge visible (purple/pink badge in top right)
Frontend: Upgrade notice shows 'AI Insights require Pro plan' for non-Pro users
Frontend: 4 Quick stats cards display (Properties, Occupancy, Monthly Revenue, Open Maintenance)
Frontend: 5 category buttons present (Executive Summary, Occupancy Analysis, Maintenance Insights, Revenue Analysis, 3-Month Forecast)
Frontend: 'Ask AI Anything' input field is visible
Frontend: AI Insights link appears in sidebar navigation
Frontend: Tenant Portal has 'Pay Rent' tab in sidebar navigation
Frontend: Tenant Rent Payments page shows 'Pay your rent securely online' subtitle
Frontend: Secure Payment notice shows Stripe integration message
seed_data_creation: Created new tenant user (testpay2_tenant@test.com) for testing

api_endpoints./api/ai/insights: Working - returns 403 for non-Pro, generates insights for Pro
api_endpoints./api/tenant-portal/rent-payments: Working - returns array of rent payments

ai_integration_notes.plan_gating: AI insights require Pro plan - correctly blocked for free/standard users

context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Insights fully implemented using emergentintegrations with GPT-4o model. Page loads at /ai-insights with proper plan gating (Pro only). Tenant Portal has 'Pay Rent' tab with Stripe integration. All new endpoints working: /api/ai/quick-stats, /api/ai/insights (POST, Pro-gated), /api/tenant-portal/rent-payments.
